product_information.description:
Het product
Olaplex® N°4P BLOND ENHANCER TONING SHAMPOO strengthens, smooths and neutralizes unwanted yellow tones for brighter, more manageable hair.
Hoe werkt het?
The sulfate-free, highly concentrated formula provides buildable toning - the longer you treat, the brighter the results.- 3x brighter. -Perfect for color-treated or natural hair & suitable for all hair types & daily use. - The original Olaplex® shampoo for long-lasting cool blonde or gray with purple pigments that neutralize unwanted yellow tones between salon visits.
Gebruik
Use on wet hair, lather well and leave on until desired shade is achieved.2-3 times a week or as often as you like to neutralize unwanted yellow tones.
Ingrediёnten
Water (Aqua/Eau), Sodium C14-16 Olefin Sulfonate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Sodium Cocoamphoacetate, Sodium Chloride, Acrylates Copolymer, Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Fragrance (Parfum), Polyquaternium-7, Bis-Aminopropyl Diglycol Dimaleate, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride , Ethylhexylglycerin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Acid Violet 43 (Cl 60730)
Meer over
For blond, bleached and gray hair. all hair types, PH value, Vegan, Animal testing freem Gluten Free, Free from nuts, paraben free, free from phosphates, sulfate free
